meta.title: Kiminobu Sato | Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Kiminobu Sato — Researcher in HCI, Autonomous Driving, and Health Informatics

hero.name: 佐藤公宜
hero.title: HCI Researcher / Waseda University Graduate School

coastGuard.description: Engaged in maritime disaster response and international joint training exercises. Gained firsthand experience in crisis management and multinational cooperation on the front lines of maritime safety.

wasedaUndergrad.period: Waseda University, School of Human Sciences, Department of Human Informatics
wasedaUndergrad.description: Graduated in three years (early graduation). Received the Okuma Memorial Scholarship (selected 3 consecutive years). Member of the Network Information Systems Laboratory. Studied human cognition, behavior, and society in an interdisciplinary framework.

wasedaGrad.period: Waseda University, Graduate School of Human Sciences (Master's)
wasedaGrad.description: Currently enrolled. Member of the Network Information Systems Laboratory. Conducting research on autonomous driving and human behavior, centered on Human-Computer Interaction (HCI).

driving.title: Autonomous Driving & Driving Behavior
driving.description: I investigate how humans drive and how they can coexist with autonomous driving systems. By combining driving simulators, eye tracking, EEG, and physiological measurements, I work on modeling human-like driving behavior and improving the acceptance of autonomous vehicles.

humanities.title: Humanities Approach to Autonomous Driving Adoption
humanities.description: The societal implementation of autonomous driving technology cannot be solved by engineering alone. By integrating insights from social psychology, history, and AI, I aim to elucidate the mechanisms by which people form attitudes toward autonomous driving and the factors that influence these attitudes.

health.title: Health Informatics (Personal Research)
health.description: I am conducting personal research using biometric data from the SOXAI Ring to examine the relationship between sauna use and sleep through an N-of-1 design. Using heart rate variability (HRV) as a key metric, I aim to quantitatively capture the physiological changes brought about by everyday health behaviors.

hitoiro.title: Hitoiro
hitoiro.description: A self-care app that records emotions as colors. It offers an experience of deepening self-understanding by visually reflecting on daily feelings.
hitoiro.stack: React + Vite / Firebase / Stripe / Claude API

bwm.title: Better Waseda Moodle Kai
bwm.description: A Chrome extension that improves the usability of Waseda University's LMS, Waseda Moodle.

soxai.title: SOXAI Health Intelligence
soxai.description: A health dashboard that visualizes SOXAI Ring data. Provides an overview of sleep, activity, and stress trends.

workguard.title: WorkGuard
workguard.description: A tool that detects and visualizes exploitative labor structures. Provides information to protect workers' rights.

idoki.title: idoki
idoki.description: An app that measures the relationship between movement and emotion. Uses DAR-3 / DAR-5 scales to explore the correlation between location and mood.

research.title: Research Collaboration & Consulting
research.description: I accept collaborative research and consulting engagements in HCI, autonomous driving, health informatics, and cognitive science.

development.title: AI App & Web Development
development.description: I undertake planning and development of applications and websites using React, Next.js, Claude API, and more.

note.title: Note Articles & Monthly Membership
note.description: I offer paid articles and monthly memberships on the theme of applying academic knowledge, HCI, and everyday life.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: For inquiries about research, development, or consulting, feel free to reach out via the form below or email.
